metadata.title: Why a wildcard covering every Anthropic model still denies every cross-region call
metadata.purpose: IAM wildcards expand the suffix after a literal prefix — no substring search; cross-region inference profiles prepend a regional namespace (`us.`, `eu.`, `ap.`) that no `anthropic.*` pattern covers.
metadata.clock: narration (Kokoro af_kore) — master clock; conform each beat to measured audio
metadata.prerequisites: IAM resource patterns, AWS ARN structure
metadata.visual_object: Two ARN suffixes aligned character-by-character — `anthropic.claude-3-5-sonnet` (green match) vs. `us.anthropic.claude-opus-4-6-v1` (fails at `u`, red) — the pattern highlighted above.
metadata.hook: The policy grants `anthropic.*` foundation models — and silently denies every call to the default model.

beats.narration_text: The policy allows `foundation-model/anthropic.*`; the default model's ARN suffix is `us.anthropic.claude-opus-4-6-v1`. The wildcard requires the string to *start* with `anthropic.`, but this one starts with `us.` — every `InvokeModel` returns Access Denied.
beats.scaffold_note: from Key case — cold open on the concrete instance

beats.narration_text: If `*` matches anything, why doesn't `anthropic.*` match a string that plainly contains "anthropic"?
The policy grants `anthropic.*` foundation models — and silently denies every call to the default model.
IAM wildcards expand the suffix after a literal prefix — no substring search; cross-region inference profiles prepend a regional namespace (`us.`, `eu.`, `ap.`) that no `anthropic.*` pattern covers.
beats.visual: Two ARN suffixes aligned character-by-character — `anthropic.claude-3-5-sonnet` (green match) vs. `us.anthropic.claude-opus-4-6-v1` (fails at `u`, red) — the pattern highlighted above.
beats.scaffold_note: the resolving mechanism; orbits the visual object

beats.narration_text: Fix: add `foundation-model/us.anthropic.*` alongside `foundation-model/anthropic.*`. Three characters (`us.`) block an entire model family.
IAM wildcards expand the suffix after a literal prefix — no substring search; cross-region inference profiles prepend a regional namespace (`us.`, `eu.`, `ap.`) that no `anthropic.*` pattern covers.
